# CureCheck

> AI-powered healthcare information platform for Indian users. CureCheck helps people verify health claims from WhatsApp forwards, understand symptoms, decode lab reports, learn about medicines, and navigate disease journeys — in plain language, in Hindi and English. Educational only; never diagnoses or prescribes.

## Primary tools

- [Health Claim Checker](https://curecheck.in/claim-checker): Paste a WhatsApp forward or health claim and get a credibility score, verdict, red flags, and safer interpretation.
- [Symptom Checker](https://curecheck.in/symptom-checker): Describe symptoms and get a plain-language overview of possible causes and when to see a doctor.
- [Report Explainer](https://curecheck.in/report-explainer): Upload or paste a CBC, thyroid, or other lab report and get plain-language findings with key term explanations.
- [Medicine Explainer](https://curecheck.in/medicine-explainer): Look up any medicine to understand what it does, common side effects, and important precautions.
- [Disease Journey Map](https://curecheck.in/disease-journey): Enter a disease and age group to see a phase-by-phase journey with typical experiences and warning signs.
- [Drug Interaction Checker](https://curecheck.in/drug-interaction): Check whether two or more medicines interact and understand the risk level.

## Additional health resources

- [Myth Buster](https://curecheck.in/myth-buster): Debunks common Indian health myths with evidence-based explanations.
- [Mental Health](https://curecheck.in/mental-health): Mental wellness resources and self-assessment tools.
- [Ayurveda](https://curecheck.in/ayurveda): Evidence-based information on Ayurvedic practices and herbs.
- [Pregnancy](https://curecheck.in/pregnancy): Week-by-week pregnancy guidance and symptom information.
- [Vaccines](https://curecheck.in/vaccines): India's childhood and adult vaccination schedule with FAQs.
- [Emergency](https://curecheck.in/emergency): First-aid guidance and emergency contact numbers for India.
- [Hospital Finder](https://curecheck.in/hospitals): Find nearby hospitals and clinics.
- [Health Calculators](https://curecheck.in/calculators): BMI, calorie, and other health calculators.
- [Doctor Prep](https://curecheck.in/doctor-prep): Prepare questions and notes before a doctor visit.
- [Fitness Hub](https://curecheck.in/fitness-hub): Workout and nutrition guidance tailored for Indian lifestyles.
- [Health Insurance](https://curecheck.in/insurance): Plain-language guide to understanding health insurance in India.
- [Health Timeline](https://curecheck.in/health-timeline): Track personal health events and build a medical history.
- [About CureCheck](https://curecheck.in/about): Mission, team, and editorial standards.

## Robots
